name: chart-pie-donut
visual_summary: A chart-pie-donut component is a data visualization UI element that displays a pie or donut chart with multiple segments. It is typically used to show how different categories contribute to a whole. This component is perfect for displaying data that has categories or subcategories.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready chart component with the following characteristics:

Name: chart-pie-donut
Description: A chart-pie-donut component is a data visualization UI element that displays a pie or donut chart with multiple segments. It is typically used to show how different categories contribute to a whole. This component is perfect for displaying data that has categories or subcategories.
Style: 2D
Interactions: 
Tags: chart, data-visualization, stats

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
